infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Recall sends reminders, learning nudges, and alerts from your connected email.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Recall uses your location for local time and to answer where you are.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Recall needs access to your photos so you can attach images in chat.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Recall uses the camera so you can take photos to attach in chat.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Recall uses your location for local time and to answer where you are.

plugins.photosPermission: Recall needs access to your photos so you can attach images in chat.
plugins.cameraPermission: Recall uses the camera so you can take photos to attach in chat.

plugins.microphonePermission: Recall uses the microphone so you can dictate messages.
